title: Rohan and the Great Sock Mystery
synopsis: When Rohan's favorite rainbow socks go missing, he becomes a detective with his friends Maya and Ben to solve the Great Sock Mystery. Their silly investigation leads them through the house, the backyard, and finally to an unexpected culprit - Rohan's puppy Charlie!

pages.text: Rohan loved his rainbow socks. They had red stripes and blue stripes. They had yellow stripes and green stripes too! Every morning, Rohan put on his rainbow socks. They made him feel happy and bouncy. But today was different. Today, Rohan could not find his socks anywhere!

illustration.description: A young Indian boy with messy black hair and big brown eyes looking confused in his bedroom. He's wearing pajamas and holding one rainbow striped sock while searching through a dresser drawer. The room is colorful with toys scattered around and bright morning sunlight streaming through the window.
illustration.alt: Rohan searching for his missing sock in his messy bedroom

pages.text: "Mom!" called Rohan. "Have you seen my rainbow socks?" Mom came into his room. She had curly brown hair and wore a yellow apron. "No, sweetie," she said. "Did you check the laundry basket?" Rohan checked the laundry basket. No rainbow socks. He checked under his bed. No rainbow socks there either!

illustration.description: Rohan's mom, a woman with curly brown hair wearing a bright yellow apron, helping him look under the bed. Rohan is on his hands and knees peeking under the bed while his mom holds up the bedspread. The room shows typical kid mess with books and toys everywhere.
illustration.alt: Rohan and his mom searching under the bed for the missing socks

pages.text: "This is a mystery!" said Rohan. "I need to find my socks!" He put on his detective hat. It was red with a big magnifying glass picture on it. Rohan looked in the mirror. "Detective Rohan is on the case!" he announced. Then he had an idea. "I need help from my friends!"

illustration.description: Rohan wearing a bright red detective hat with a magnifying glass design, looking at himself in a mirror with a determined expression. He's pointing at his reflection and has one fist on his hip in a superhero pose. The mirror frame is decorated with colorful stickers.
illustration.alt: Rohan in his detective hat looking determined in the mirror

pages.text: Rohan called his best friend Maya. Maya had long black braids and always wore purple glasses. "Maya, I need your help!" said Rohan. "My rainbow socks are missing!" "Oh no!" said Maya. "I'll be right over!" Maya loved solving puzzles. She was very good at finding lost things.

illustration.description: Maya, a young girl with long black braids and bright purple glasses, talking on a colorful phone. She looks excited and is wearing a green t-shirt. Her room has bookshelves full of puzzle boxes and detective stories in the background.
illustration.alt: Maya talking on the phone, excited to help solve the mystery

pages.text: Next, Rohan called his friend Ben. Ben had red curly hair and freckles all over his nose. "Ben, can you help me find my socks?" asked Rohan. "Sure!" said Ben. "I love mysteries!" Ben was great at looking in weird places. He once found his dad's keys in the refrigerator!

illustration.description: Ben, a boy with bright red curly hair and lots of freckles, grinning widely while holding a phone. He's wearing a blue striped shirt and looks very enthusiastic. Behind him is a kitchen with an open refrigerator showing unusual items like a toy car and a book inside.
illustration.alt: Ben smiling while talking on the phone, ready for an adventure

pages.text: Soon, Maya and Ben arrived at Rohan's house. They all wore detective hats now. "Let's make a plan," said Maya. She pulled out a notebook. "First, we search the house. Then, we search outside." "Good plan!" said Ben. "But what if we can't find them?" "We will find them," said Rohan. "We are the best detectives ever!"

illustration.description: Three children wearing colorful detective hats huddled together looking at Maya's notebook. Maya is in the center writing, while Rohan and Ben peer over her shoulders. They're standing in Rohan's living room with bright furniture and family photos on the walls.
illustration.alt: The three detective friends making a plan with Maya's notebook

pages.text: The three detectives searched everywhere in the house. They looked in the kitchen cabinets. They looked behind the couch cushions. Ben even looked in the refrigerator! "No socks in here," he said. "Just milk and apples." Maya checked the bathroom. "No socks by the bathtub either," she reported.

illustration.description: Ben with his head inside a bright refrigerator, Maya looking behind a colorful bathroom door, and Rohan lifting couch cushions. The scene is split to show all three locations at once. Each child looks focused and determined in their search.
illustration.alt: The three friends searching different rooms of the house

pages.text: "Let's try the backyard," suggested Maya. They went outside. The sun was shining bright. Rohan's dog Charlie was sleeping under the big oak tree. "Maybe the socks are in the garden," said Ben. They looked behind the flowers. They looked under the swing set. Still no rainbow socks!

illustration.description: The three children searching in a bright, sunny backyard with a large oak tree. Charlie, a small golden puppy, is sleeping peacefully in the shade. There are colorful flowers, a wooden swing set, and green grass everywhere. The children are bending down looking behind plants.
illustration.alt: The detective friends searching the backyard while Charlie the puppy sleeps

pages.text: "This is hard work," said Ben. He sat down on the grass. "Where could those socks be?" Maya sat down too. "Maybe they grew legs and walked away!" she giggled. Rohan laughed. "Silly Maya! Socks don't have legs!" Just then, Charlie the puppy woke up. He stretched and yawned a big yawn.

illustration.description: The three tired children sitting on bright green grass laughing together. Charlie the golden puppy is stretching with his front paws extended and mouth open in a big yawn. The children look happy despite being tired, with big smiles on their faces.
illustration.alt: The friends resting on the grass while Charlie stretches and yawns

pages.text: Charlie walked over to the children. He wagged his fluffy tail. "Hi Charlie," said Rohan, petting his dog. Then Maya noticed something strange. "Rohan, look at Charlie's mouth!" she said. There was something colorful hanging from Charlie's teeth. It looked like... "My rainbow sock!" shouted Rohan.

illustration.description: Charlie the golden puppy with a rainbow striped sock hanging from his mouth, looking slightly guilty with big innocent eyes. The three children are pointing at him with surprised expressions. Rohan looks shocked, Maya looks like she solved the puzzle, and Ben is laughing.
illustration.alt: Charlie the puppy with Rohan's rainbow sock in his mouth

pages.text: "Charlie, what did you do?" asked Rohan. Charlie dropped the sock and barked happily. His tail wagged even faster. "He thinks we're playing a game!" laughed Ben. "But where is the other sock?" wondered Maya. They followed Charlie as he ran toward his doghouse. The little puppy was very excited.

illustration.description: Charlie running toward a colorful wooden doghouse with the three children following behind. The puppy looks playful and happy, while the children look curious and excited. The doghouse is painted in bright colors with Charlie's name on a sign above the entrance.
illustration.alt: Charlie leading the children to his doghouse

pages.text: Charlie went into his doghouse. When he came back out, he had the other rainbow sock in his mouth! "Charlie, you sock thief!" giggled Rohan. Charlie had been playing with the socks all along. He had hidden them in his doghouse like buried treasure. "Mystery solved!" announced Maya proudly.

illustration.description: Charlie emerging from his doghouse with the second rainbow sock, while all three children are laughing and clapping. Charlie looks proud and happy with his tail wagging. Both rainbow socks are visible, showing their bright red, blue, yellow, and green stripes.
illustration.alt: Charlie bringing out the second sock while the children celebrate

pages.text: Rohan took both his rainbow socks back. They were a little wet from Charlie's mouth, but not torn. "Thank you for helping me," Rohan told his friends. "We make a great detective team!" "We sure do!" agreed Ben. "What should we solve next?" asked Maya. They all laughed together.

illustration.description: The three friends standing together holding hands in a circle, all wearing their detective hats and laughing joyfully. Rohan is holding his rainbow socks in one hand. Charlie sits nearby wagging his tail. The backyard setting shows the beautiful sunny day with flowers and the oak tree.
illustration.alt: The three detective friends celebrating their success together

pages.text: Rohan went inside to put on his clean rainbow socks. They felt perfect on his feet again. "Next time, Charlie," he said to his puppy, "please don't take my socks!" Charlie barked and wagged his tail. He was already looking at Rohan's shoes. Rohan quickly picked them up! "Oh no, Charlie! Not my shoes too!"

illustration.description: Rohan sitting on his bed putting on his clean rainbow socks with a big smile. Charlie is sitting on the floor looking mischievously at Rohan's sneakers nearby. Rohan is reaching for his shoes with a worried but amused expression. The bedroom is tidy now with morning sunlight still streaming in.
illustration.alt: Rohan putting on his socks while Charlie eyes his shoes mischievously

pages.text: From that day on, Rohan always put his socks in a high drawer. Maya, Ben, and Rohan became the best detective team in the neighborhood. They solved the mystery of the missing cookies, the case of the squeaky door, and many more! And Charlie? He learned to play with his own toys... most of the time!

illustration.description: A happy ending scene showing all three friends playing in Rohan's room, with detective hats and magnifying glasses scattered around. Charlie is playing with his own rope toy in the corner. The room is neat with socks safely stored in a tall dresser drawer that's clearly out of Charlie's reach.
illustration.alt: The friends playing together while Charlie plays with appropriate toys

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What was special about Rohan's missing socks?
questions.explanation: Rohan's socks had rainbow stripes with red, blue, yellow, and green colors that made him feel happy and bouncy.

questions.question: Who were Rohan's detective friends?
questions.explanation: Maya, who wore purple glasses and loved puzzles, and Ben, who had red curly hair and freckles, helped Rohan solve the mystery.

questions.question: Where did they find the missing socks?
questions.explanation: Charlie the puppy had taken the socks to play with and hidden them in his doghouse like buried treasure.

questions.question: What did Maya use to make their search plan?
questions.explanation: Maya pulled out a notebook to write down their detective plan of searching the house first, then outside.

questions.question: What did Rohan do to prevent Charlie from taking his socks again?
choices: He put them in a high drawer
He gave them to his mom
questions.explanation: Rohan learned to put his socks in a high drawer where Charlie couldn't reach them.

pages.instructions: Help complete the story by choosing the right words!
pages.text: Rohan loved his _____ socks. When he couldn't find them, he put on his detective _____ and called his friends Maya and _____. They searched everywhere in the _____ and even in the backyard. Finally, they found the socks in Charlie's _____!

pages.title: Detective Team Word Puzzle
pages.instructions: Choose the correct words to describe our detective friends!
pages.text: Maya wore _____ glasses and loved solving puzzles. Ben had _____ curly hair and lots of freckles. Charlie was Rohan's playful _____ who liked to take things that didn't belong to him. Together, they made a great _____ team!
